# Partners and Industries

Explore industry-specific integrations and partnership opportunities with Tealium across automotive, pharmaceutical, AI, and identity solutions.

## About markdown versions

All pages in this area are available in clean markdown format. To access the markdown version of any page, append `/index.md` to the page URL.

Example:
- HTML: `https://docs.tealium.com/iq-tag-management/getting-started/what-is-tealium-iq/`
- Markdown: `https://docs.tealium.com/iq-tag-management/getting-started/what-is-tealium-iq/index.md`


## Partners and Industries


- [Tealium + Google Analytics 4 Measurement Protocol Integration Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/google-analytics-4-measurement-protocol-connector-integration-guide/): This article describes how to configure and use the Google Analytics 4 Measurement Protocol Tag and Connector together with Tealium.

- [AudienceStream CDP + Optimizely X](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/optimizely-integration-with-audiencestream/): Integrate Optimizely with AudienceStream to use audiences to build targeted experiments in Optimizely Classic or Optimizely X.

- [Google SA360 Enhanced Conversions Implementation Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/google-sa360-enhanced-conversions-implementation-guide/): This article provides information about implementing Google SA360 Enhanced Conversions.

- [IBM WebSphere Commerce Integration Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/ibm-websphere-commerce-integration-guide/): IBM Websphere Commerce's Tealium Extension is designed to help you integrate Tealium iQ Tag Management within your IBM Websphere solution. Using this extension you can add Tealium's Universal Data Object (UDO) into your site's data layer.

- [Integrating AudienceStream and Optimizely Full Stack](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/integrating-audiencestream-and-optimizely-full-stack/): This article describes best practices used to integrate Tealium AudienceStream and Optimizely Full Stack.

- [Tealium + AdFixus Integration Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/tealium-adfixus-integration/): This article describes how to set up the AdFixus integration tag in your iQ Tag Management account.

- [Tealium + Braze Integration Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/tealium-braze-integration-guide/): This article describes how to get the most out of Tealium and Braze.

- [Tealium + Clicktale Integration Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/tealium-clicktale-carmel-integration-guide/): This article describes how to set up the Clicktale tag in your iQ Tag Management account.

- [Tealium + Contentsquare Integration Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/tealium-contentsquare-integration-guide/): This article describes how to get the most out of Tealium and Contentsquare by setting up the Contentsquare UX Analytics tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account and enabling the transmission of Tealium audiences and Visitor badges to Contentsquare.

- [Tealium + Digioh Integration Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/tealium-digioh-integration-guide/): This article describes how to create a data source for Digioh to send form submission events to your Tealium account.

- [Tealium + Google Enhanced Conversions Integration Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/tealium-google-enhanced-conversions-integration-guide/): This article describes how to get the most out of Tealium and Google Ads Enhanced Conversion by setting up the Google Ads Conversion Tracking & Remarketing (gtag.js) tag in iQ Tag Management and the Google Ads Enhanced Conversions for Web connector in EventStream API Hub.

- [Tealium + Invoca Integration Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/tealium-invoca-integration-guide/): This article describes how to get the most out of Tealium and Invoca by setting up the Invoca tag in Tealium iQ Tag Management and then enabling the bi-directional integration in Tealium AudienceStream.

- [Tealium + Leanplum Integration Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/tealium-leanplum-integration-guide/): This article describes how to get the most out of Tealium and Leanplum.

- [Tealium + ObservePoint Integration Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/tealium-observepoint-integration-guide/): This article describes how to get the most out of Tealium and ObservePoint by setting up the ObservePoint tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account and configuring it to send Tealium audiences and badges to ObservePoint.

- [Tealium + Optimizely Integration Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/tealium-optimizely-integration-guide/): This article describes how to get the most out of Tealium and Optimizely and enable the transmission of Tealium audiences and audience badges to Optimizely.

- [Tealium + Quantum Metric Integration Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/tech-partners/tealium-quantum-metric-integration-guide/): This article describes how to get the most out of Tealium and Quantum Metric by setting up the Quantum Metric tag in Tealium iQ Tag Management and enabling the Quantum Metric Tag to send Session Replay URLs to Tealium AudienceStream.

- [Become a Partner](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/partner-with-us/become-a-partner/): Learn how to integrate your platform with the Tealium Customer Data Hub.

- [Data Sources](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/partner-with-us/data-sources/): Learn how to send data into Tealium from your application using inbound data integrations.

- [CMP Plugins](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/partner-with-us/cmp-plugins/): Learn how to integrate your Consent Management Platform (CMP) with Tealium iQ Tag Management to enforce privacy settings for managed tags.

- [CMS Plugins](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/partner-with-us/cms-plugins/): Learn how to integrate the Tealium Universal Tag (utag.js) with your content management system.

- [Tags](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/partner-with-us/tags/): Learn how to integrate your browser-based tag with Tealium iQ Tag Management.

- [Mobile](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/partner-with-us/mobile/): Learn how to integrate your mobile SDK with Tealium for Mobile.

- [Connectors](https://docs.tealium.com/partners-and-industries/partner-with-us/connectors/): Learn how to integrate your server-side API for real-time activation of event and customer data in Tealium.
